text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
It's finally, finally, finally here! I'm running against
Oguri today in the Mile Championship! The clash
of destiny I've waited for since I was a kid is here!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for believing in my dream, Trainer!
Thank you so, so, so much!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Today, my dream comes true! I'm gonna transform
this race against my ultimate rival into one that'll
inspire dreams in everyone!
